full_text: God, you look so pretty when you tell me that you love me I wish that I could lie, but my mind gets in the way I know you think it all, always way too self aware Oh, we could never be together, but it's nice to play pretend I wish that I could lie, but I'm way too self aware

segments.text: God, you look so pretty when you tell me that you love me
I wish that I could lie, but my mind gets in the way
I know you think it all, always way too self aware
Oh, we could never be together, but it's nice to play pretend
I wish that I could lie, but I'm way too self aware
